title: add gross margin, app submissions, and 6h cache to KPI dashboard
author: ElliotEtag

gist.headline: Crunching the numbers
gist.blurb: We've upgraded our internal KPI dashboard to track gross margins and app submissions, plus gave it a hefty performance boost with 6-hour caching.
gist.summary: Added gross margin and app submission tracking to the internal KPI dashboard, along with improved GitHub authentication and extended cache TTLs.
gist.impact: The team gets better visibility into platform health and community growth without hitting API rate limits.
gist.visual_concept: The PR is about a dashboard, metrics, charts, and caching. The bee (Polly) and the Monitor Robot (who loves data/screens) are perfect here. The robot's screen can show a rising chart. Polly can be holding a tiny clipboard or a magnifying glass.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing tiny reading glasses and holding a clipboard, looking at a chunky pixel robot with a CRT monitor head. The robot's screen displays a glowing lime green (#ecf874) rising bar chart. Soft pastel lavender and cream gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.
